description_long: This is a modern laptop with a sleek, black chassis and a partially open display. The keyboard is full-sized with white keys and a standard QWERTY layout, including a function row but no numeric keypad. The touchpad is centered below the keyboard, and several stickers are visible on the left palm rest, indicating hardware specifications or branding. The screen is glossy and dark, currently off, reflecting some ambient light. The laptop's exterior appears to be made primarily of plastic with some metallic and glass components, and it features a few visible ports on the left side.
description: A sleek black laptop with a white keyboard, glossy dark screen, and hardware stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Left-side view showing the open screen, white keyboard, touchpad, and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by the back of the open screen, with no keyboard or stickers visible.
description_view_2: Right-side view similar to view 0, showing the keyboard, touchpad, and stickers, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the full keyboard, touchpad, stickers on the left palm rest, and the glossy, dark screen.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, and standard key arrangement.
attribute_sticker_placement: Three stickers are present on the left palm rest, near the touchpad, each rectangular and featuring colored graphics or text.
